text":"有人看见的是匆匆忙忙奔跑的人，还有在雨夜里呼喊求助的弱者……"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"有人看见的是各种颜色的雨伞，在雨幕中撑出来一片自己的世界……"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"……"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"当然，据说也有人会看见不一样的景色。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"冲刷而下的雨水在悄然逆流，城市在暗雨中被分割，然后……在破碎的雨夜天帷之中，飘扬着无数幽冷的水母……"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"长长的触须倒垂而下，撩拨着在雨夜里绝望呼救的人，成为他们救命的稻草……"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"……"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"有人因它一夜暴富，白得了100万海德拉金券，成为百万富豪。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"有人因它而摆脱危机，脱离恐惧，重新回归正常生活。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"有人因它而实现心愿，让对手在雨夜的酣梦中长眠……"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"……"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「在雨夜中实现心愿的水母……真是个不错的故事。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"夜离站在巨大的落地窗前，一边说着，一边看着窗外。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"闪耀的七色霓虹照亮了整个雨幕……但让人不可思议的也是眼前的雨幕……"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"——逆流的雨，还有拖曳着长长的、泛着幽冷蓝光的触须、徘徊在窗前的巨大水母……"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"如同都市传闻里的一样，是一场现实而又梦幻的雨夜幻梦。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「但渴求着实现心愿的人也许忘记了，深海的水母，即便再如何美丽而寂静，也依然还是一位猎手。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"夜离放下手中的红茶，看着眼前的席琳丝。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「这座城市实在是太无聊了，我只是为它加了点料而已。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「很符合这座城市，不是吗？小蝴蝶？」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"席琳丝坐在一旁的桌上，有些自得得看着眼前的夜离。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「我想知道你的理由。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「理由？没什么理由，就只是觉得这样好玩而已。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「你不觉得这很有趣吗？」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"席琳丝从坐着的桌子上跳了下来，光着脚，走向了落地的窗前。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「人类总是很喜欢为自己编造故事，而继承了人类人格特征的异格者，也一样保留了这样的特点。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「他们会在自己预设的故事里，扮演自己的角色，构成一个名为【命运】的剧本。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「但有趣的剧本从来不是冥思苦想，和依靠周密的计划写出来的，而是依靠自然的即兴演绎。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「而人……只有在最真实、最绝望的现实里，才能变成最好的演员。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「走投无路，是他们演技的最佳养料。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"席琳丝回过头来，看向了眼前的夜离。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「不过嘛……」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「也还是有点美中不足。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「普通人，就算演技再好，他们所能出演的剧幕也十分有限。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「没有起伏、没有意外、没有惊喜……这种一眼可以看到底的平庸剧幕，我已经厌倦了，也失去了耐心。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「雨夜的剧幕……要是能找到别具一格的演出者，说不定能演绎出更惊喜、更有趣的戏码。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「你说是吗？小蝴蝶！」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"她转过头来，玩味地看向夜离，看向那位「超链者协会蜃都分会的会长」。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「你让我想起了一个人。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"夜离笑了笑。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「什么人？」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「是我很久之前的一个朋友，如果她还在蜃都，你一定会乐意跟她打交道。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「只可惜……她成了戍墙者。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"夜离笑了笑。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「但话说回来……」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「我不是你的猎物哦，席琳丝。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「但如果你想要，我倒是可以给你提供一个更有意思的猎物。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「哦？」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「说说看？」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"席琳丝少见地来了兴致。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「他马上就要来了。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"夜离站了起来，走向了席琳丝。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"同样站在落地窗前，但却看向了雨幕的前方。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"在雨水奋力冲刷的街道，一辆豪华的黑色轿车在这栋并不起眼的建筑前停下。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"随从撑着黑伞，拉开了车门，紧随其后，一个头发半白的中年男人从车厢里走了下来。"}]}]},"moreInfo":"","moreBtn":"查看升级效果","iconSize":{"width":"60px","height":"60px"}},{"key":"0.ad923e74cde51","isShowIcon":false,"isShowName":false,"isShowDesc":true,"isShowMore":false,"filterTabKey":"0.7fdcf39cb64dd","iconSize":{"width":67,"height":70},"icon":"","name":"","label":"","desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【小丑的王座】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"舞会落下帷幕的方式，并不是原本准备好的焰火。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"而是一场爆炸。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"空中庭院，这座菲尔特家族在空中建造的空岛，被视为蜃都地区的传奇建筑，也是蜃海集团的标志，最终在爆炸中坠入了荒野。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"如同一颗越过长空的流星……"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"暴雨冲刷着废墟，搜救行动已经结束了好几个系统时。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"周围只剩下一辆黑色的轿车，一个头发半白的中年男人撑着黑伞，看着眼前的残骸。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「副总裁，娜菲忒小姐已经醒过来了，您……该回去了。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"旁边的随从提醒着他。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「我知道了。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"他深吸了口气，然后转过身，钻进了那辆漆黑的轿车里。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"而这里，只剩下冰冷的残骸和寂静的雨幕。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"……"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"席琳丝坐在高高的天台，眺望着空中庭院坠落的那片荒野，紧随其后，他看着那辆熟悉的轿车逐渐远离。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"她轻轻抚摸着那只巨大的蓝色水母。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「没想到……鲁伯特居然真的动手了，菲尔特家族……居然以这样的形式迎来了自己的终局。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「不过……那个在空中庭院里出现的黑影……到底是什么人？」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「这……也是你剧本中的一环吗？」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"站在旁边的维罗妮卡看着席琳丝。她猜不透这个看起来只有十四五岁的少女。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「这不是我的剧本哦，亲爱的小玫瑰。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「这是鲁伯特自己的剧本，是他自己的选择，自己的演绎。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「而我只是一名坐在观众席里的观众。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「于演出而言，观众，从不登上舞台。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"席琳丝微笑着。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「但还真是让人惊喜呢。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「协会那只小蝴蝶的眼光，真是不错。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「出色的演技、出色的情节、还有充满未知的结局与末途……」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「有趣……真是太有趣了……」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「浸染鲜血的王冠，但戴上它的，却是一位走投无路的小丑……」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「你说……鲁伯特他会有这个能力挣脱操纵自己的丝线吗？」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"席琳丝的眼神里满是愉悦，在这场暴雨中，她那愉悦的面容，多少让维罗妮卡觉得有些惊悚。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「我并不关心这些哦，席琳丝。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「你知道我在乎的是什么。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「放心吧，这么棒的演出，自然也会有出乎意料的彩头。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「三天后，你效忠的那位白胡子老头的桌上，会拿到答案的。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「这是我给他的礼物，希望他能活得久一些。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"席琳丝冲着维罗妮卡抛了个媚眼。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「好了，我就不在这里陪你了。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「好不容易遇见一个这么出色的演员，我要给他的剧本再增添点惊喜。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"她从一旁的钢架上跃下，然后缓缓地离开。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"维罗妮卡看着她远去的背影，深吸了口气。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"……"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"十五分钟后，在蜃都某个阴暗的角落里。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"席琳丝干净地放倒了几个训练有素的杀手……"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"泛着蓝光的触须缠绕在他们的身上，那只巨大的水母贪婪地吞食着他们身上的人格数据，直到他们的存在被彻底抹除。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「好了，出来吧，小气球妹妹。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"她看着躲在角落垃圾桶旁的莉莉斯。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「你……你是什么人？」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「别担心，我是来救你们的。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"……"}]}]},"moreInfo":"","moreBtn":"查看升级效果"},{"key":"0.021e73c84bff8","isShowIcon":false,"isShowName":false,"isShowDesc":true,"isShowMore":false,"filterTabKey":"0.ff1201a5ee3a8","iconSize":{"width":67,"height":70},"icon":"","name":"","label":"","desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【公主与骑士】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"柯卡尔迪原以为，法恩利要自己去蜃都，是为了处理蜃都的坏账，重新建立海德拉银行在蜃都的版图。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"毕竟，那里的账从经理人维利尔死后，就一直处于混沌状态。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"印钞机的熄火，给海德拉银行添了不小的麻烦，也是法恩利一直头疼的地方。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"宁芙涅一直想去处理，但都被法恩利拒绝了，所有人都觉得，只有柯卡尔迪是最好的候选人。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"而他，今天正好被法恩利叫去了。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「这是……」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"看完了手头的材料，柯卡尔迪简直不敢相信自己的眼睛。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「蜃都地区递过来的材料。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「真是匪夷所思，所有的坏账，居然在一夜之间几乎全部平息了……」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「到底是谁做的？」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"柯卡尔迪的反应，一切都在法恩利的意料之中。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"他笑了笑，但很快就又咳嗽了起来。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「咳咳……」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「还记得我们在蜃都雨夜里遇见的那个女孩吗？」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「是她？」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"柯卡尔迪想起了那个看起来只有十四五岁的女孩。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「那你叫我干什么？」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「我也不想劳烦你，但有人指名要见你。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「去吧，帮我把这个东西带给她。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「这是什么？」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「任命书，她已经答应，成为经理人了。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「但条件是，你要亲自去迎接她。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「老头，雇佣童工，可是不合规矩的。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「她看起来最多也才十五岁吧。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「你也说了，只是看起来而已。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"法恩利看向了柯卡尔迪。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"……"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"还是在一个冰冷的雨夜。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"在一处堆满残骸和垃圾的荒原。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"柯卡尔迪撑着伞，一边看着市民送来的吊唁菲尔特家族的花圈，一边静静地等候。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"轻盈的铃声在雨幕中分外清晰，随后，一只巨大的水母出现在了雨帷之中……"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"……"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"来了。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"柯卡尔迪深吸了口气，转过身。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"撑着洋伞，光着脚，她还是老样子。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「好久不见，变色龙先生。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「我说过，我们还会相遇的，而你……一定会来迎接我。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"……"}]}]},"moreInfo":"","moreBtn":"查看升级效果"}]}},{"key":"0.905e73c793ab78","type":"character-profile","data":{"isShowImageList":true,"isShowName":true,"isShowAttrList":true,"isShowDesc":true,"title":"推荐搭配","name":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"推荐"}]}]},"descTitle":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"角色简介"}]}]},"desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【战术定位】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"减益，控制"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"﻿"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【养成建议】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"┌─────────┬────────────┐"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"|
